user.description: Search for your address (VafabMiljö's pickup calendar works without logging in).

address.description: Choose your address from the matches.

bankid_start.description: Optionally connect your account via BankID to also get invoices and contract details.

reauth_confirm.description: Your VafabMiljö BankID session expired. Sign in again to keep invoices and contract data updating.

reconfigure.description: Search for the new address to bind this entry to.

reconfigure_address.description: Choose the new address from the matches.

progress.waiting_for_bankid:
Open the BankID app and scan this QR code:

{qr_code}

error.cannot_connect: Failed to reach VafabMiljö. Please try again.
error.qr_expired: The QR code expired before it was scanned. Submit again for a new one.

init.description: This is a waste-collection calendar, not live data - the default 30 minutes is usually plenty.
